name: Search books
description: Search the Calibre-Web library by title, author or keyword. Returns book ID, title, author, summary and available formats. Use the book ID with calibre_toggle_read or calibre_get_cover.

name: Build request
Format response
Stats
description: Get Calibre-Web library statistics: total books, authors, categories, series and file formats.

name: Build request
Format response
Toggle read
description: Toggle the read/unread status of a book in Calibre-Web. Use the book ID from calibre_search.

name: Build request
Format response
Get cover
description: Fetch the cover image for a book and display it. Use the book ID from calibre_search.

name: Build request
Format response
Recent books
description: Get the most recently added books in the Calibre library, sorted newest first. Returns the same fields as calibre_search. Use the book ID with calibre_toggle_read or calibre_get_cover.
